queries.question: Show me the restriction limits every route has.
queries.sql: SELECT Restrictions.value  from routes_restrictions join routes ON routes_restrictions.routesId = Routes.id join restrictions ON routes_restrictions.restrictionsType = Restrictions.restrictionType GROUP BY Routes_Restrictions.restrictionsType HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Routes_Restrictions.routesId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Routes)

queries.question: Show me the restriction limits every route has.
queries.sql: select routes.routename , restrictions.value from routes_restrictions join routes ON routes_restrictions.routesId = Routes.id join restrictions ON routes_restrictions.restrictionsType = Restrictions.restrictionType
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?routename ?value WHERE {
  ?routes_restrictions a :Routes_Restrictions .
  ?routes a :Routes .
  ?routes_restrictions p:hasRoutes ?routes .
  ?restrictions a :Restrictions .
  ?routes_restrictions p:restrictionsType ?restrictionstype_restrictiontype .
  ?restrictions p:type ?restrictionstype_restrictiontype .
  ?routes p:name ?routename .
  ?restrictions p:value ?value .
}

queries.question: What restriction types and values are common to all routes?
queries.sql: SELECT Restrictions.restrictionType, Restrictions.value  from routes_restrictions join routes ON routes_restrictions.routesId = Routes.id join restrictions ON routes_restrictions.restrictionsType = Restrictions.restrictionType GROUP BY Routes_Restrictions.restrictionsType HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Routes_Restrictions.routesId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Routes)

queries.question: Show me the restriction types corresponding to each route respectively.
queries.sql: select routes.routename , restrictions.restrictiontype from routes_restrictions join routes ON routes_restrictions.routesId = Routes.id join restrictions ON routes_restrictions.restrictionsType = Restrictions.restrictionType
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?routename ?restrictiontype WHERE {
  ?routes_restrictions a :Routes_Restrictions .
  ?routes a :Routes .
  ?routes_restrictions p:hasRoutes ?routes .
  ?restrictions a :Restrictions .
  ?routes_restrictions p:restrictionsType ?restrictionstype_restrictiontype .
  ?restrictions p:type ?restrictionstype_restrictiontype .
  ?routes p:name ?routename .
  ?restrictions p:type ?restrictiontype .
}

queries.question: What are the restriction types and values for each route?
queries.sql: select routes.routename , restrictions.restrictiontype , restrictions.value from routes_restrictions join routes ON routes_restrictions.routesId = Routes.id join restrictions ON routes_restrictions.restrictionsType = Restrictions.restrictionType
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?routename ?restrictiontype ?value WHERE {
  ?routes_restrictions a :Routes_Restrictions .
  ?routes a :Routes .
  ?routes_restrictions p:hasRoutes ?routes .
  ?restrictions a :Restrictions .
  ?routes_restrictions p:restrictionsType ?restrictionstype_restrictiontype .
  ?restrictions p:type ?restrictionstype_restrictiontype .
  ?routes p:name ?routename .
  ?restrictions p:type ?restrictiontype .
  ?restrictions p:value ?value .
}

queries.question: Show me the restriction types for each route.
queries.sql: SELECT Restrictions.restrictionType  from routes_restrictions join routes ON routes_restrictions.routesId = Routes.id join restrictions ON routes_restrictions.restrictionsType = Restrictions.restrictionType GROUP BY Routes_Restrictions.restrictionsType HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Routes_Restrictions.routesId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Routes)
